payment_history: string summarizing last 3 months of payments
affordability: exactly one of: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, VERY LOW, NOT SURE
reason_for_affordability: string showing your calculation and conclusion
willingness: exactly one of: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, VERY LOW, NOT SURE
solution_evidence: string citing which decision rule matched
proposed_email_to_customer: string starting with Subject: then Body: or NO_ACTION
arrears_clearance_plan: object with monthly_payment_recommended, surplus_above_mad, total_arrears, months_to_clear, projected_timeline OR null
